ItacPersonItem.Notes: Physician, Professor of `Teorica medica straordinaria` at the University of Padua, in 1668 Borromeo joined the Ricovrati, where he was elected Principe for the years 1688 and 1696-1700.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
